entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. being studied.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization that developed the collection.

entities.name: EMBRAPA
entities.description: Brazilian Agricultural Research Corporation, an organization that developed the collection.

entities.name: GLOBAL COMPOSITE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 1000 diverse groundnut accessions developed by ICRISAT and EMBRAPA.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT MINI CORE SUBSET
entities.description: A specific subset of 184 groundnut accessions within the composite collection.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region from which 110 accessions were sourced.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Biological factors causing stress to the crop, for which resistance is a trait of interest.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-biological factors causing stress to the crop, for which resistance is a trait of interest.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity quickly.

entities.name: FRESH SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The characteristic of seeds remaining dormant when fresh.

entities.name: LARGE-SEED
entities.description: The characteristic of producing seeds of large size.

entities.name: HIGH SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The characteristic of having a high ratio of kernel weight to pod weight.

entities.name: HIGH OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The characteristic of having a high percentage of oil in the seeds.

entities.name: HIGH PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The characteristic of having a high percentage of protein in the seeds.

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS ACCESSIONS
entities.description: 114 accessions of wild species of the Arachis genus.

entities.name: MOLECULAR PROFILING
entities.description: The process of characterizing the genetic makeup of the collection.

entities.name: SSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used as molecular markers for profiling.

entities.name: HIGH THROUGHPUT ASSAY
entities.description: The automated assay method (ABI3700) used for molecular profiling.
